_provenance: Schema-derived from amendment B2 (High). Edge case: same ticker appears in multiple symphonies (composition overlap). The L1 metric scores each symphony independently; the overlap is irrelevant to selection — we select ONE symphony whose holdings best match the target. The test verifies the scorer handles per-symphony exposure maps cleanly even when tickers recur across candidates.
description: Amendment B2 fixture: same ticker (SPY) in all three symphonies. Selection is per-symphony, not cross-symphony.

derivations.sym-overlap-B: SPY: max(0,8000-8000)=0 + overshoot=0. QQQ: max(0,2000-2000)=0 + overshoot=0. Total=0. Perfect match.
derivations.sym-overlap-C: SPY: max(0,8000-3000)=5000 + overshoot=0. QQQ: max(0,2000-0)=2000 + overshoot=0 (sym-C has no QQQ). Total=7000.
derivations.overlap_handling: Tickers appearing in multiple symphonies are scored against each symphony independently. No cross-symphony aggregation occurs in the selection step.
